bankLocationId.description: The location id of the bank. The field value is `nil` in most cases.

expiryYear.description: The last two digits of the year the card expires. For example, **22** for the year 2022.

iban.description: The IBAN of the bank account.

id.description: A unique identifier of this stored payment method.

lastFour.description: The last four digits of the PAN.

name.description: The display name of the stored payment method.

networkTxReference.description:
Returned in the response if you are not tokenizing with Adyen and are using the Merchant-initiated transactions (MIT) framework from Mastercard or Visa.

This contains either the Mastercard Trace ID or the Visa Transaction ID.

ownerName.description: The name of the bank account holder.

supportedRecurringProcessingModels.description: The supported recurring processing models for this stored payment method.

supportedShopperInteractions.description: The supported shopper interactions for this stored payment method.
